title:

content:
## Updated ACC horse injury claims
Current data on horse related injuries.
Out-dated data.  Last data set only went up to part-way through 2022.

### Response from Accident Compensation Corporation
Status Dataset submitted
Comments Kia ora, thank you for your request. The uploaded dataset can be viewed here:
https://catalogue.data.govt.nz/dataset/098cdc09-faf3-4a14-b482-8fca8623fc32/resource/25b734c9-2003-4412-9ccf-a1637ba61d91/download/ar-9745-horse-injury-claims.xlsx

#### Likely Source Agency
Accident Compensation Corporation
